title: tengine.session.frame_milestone v1
description: Emitted every 100 frames as a lightweight liveness heartbeat, cheaper than subscribing to the full tengine.session.frame stream. Producer: registry handle FRAME_MILESTONE in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs. CloudEvents subject is 'frame_{frame}'.

session_id.description: Provenance header: session-dir basename, stable correlation id for this silo run.

silo.description: Provenance header: silo identifier as configured.

wt_count.description: Provenance header: number of work-types active in this session.

reload_generation.description: Provenance header: hot-reload generation counter; increments on each TSDL/constants reload.

frame_phase.description: Provenance header: current frame-phase enum value at emission time.

frame_index_basis.description: Provenance header: which frame counter this event's frame numbers are relative to (e.g. 'session' vs 'process').

frame.description: GPU frame index at this milestone (multiple of 100).
